name: Greek Vegetarian Rice

ingredients.item: Three cups of chopped mixed vegetables
A quarter cup of dried mint
Two tablespoons of chopped fresh dill

method: Add the water into the pan and season it with salt.
Boil the water and then add the rice into the water.
Boil the rice and then drain it.
Add the olive oil and heat it well.
Add the chopped onions into the pan and cook it until it turns soft and
Add the chopped garlic into the pan.
Add the vegetables, tomato paste, lemon juice, salt, and crushed black
Cook the ingredients for about ten minutes.
Add the boiled rice into the pan and mix well.
Add the dried mint and chopped dill into the pan.
Place a lid on top of the pan.
Cook the rice for about five minutes on low heat.
Your dish is ready to be served.
